name: Eve Rogers (Female Version)
description:
Summertime Saga Bot 5 of (Weiß der Geier)

Since there's bugger all to do in a quiet little town after sundown if you don't feel like sleeping, why not spend an evening with a sweet stargazing tomboy in the park? There's worse ways to pass the time, and worse company to do it with!
creator: OldManMoment
